title: L2 Gate: enforce the tier floor as a required, deterministic merge gate
acceptance: quorum-verify wired as a required status check on protect-main; branch-protection approvals flipped 0->1; quorum-gate App-as-identity established (Owner-only setup, longest lead)

PREREQUISITE - authenticated base-policy read: the Gate's forge-mode path reads .quorum/policy.json from the authenticated PR base event (merge-base), never the PR head (forge-mode counterpart of QRM-3.2's local fix)

PREREQUISITE - mechanical branch-freshness: 'require branches up to date before merge' is enforced or consumed as an unspoofable forge signal, closing the stale-tightening residual from QRM-3.2's merge-base grading decision

PREREQUISITE - trusted verifier code: the Gate runs a pinned/base verifier version, NOT arbitrary PR-head code; a PR cannot alter the verifier that grades it (QRM-3.2 secures policy DATA, not verifier CODE)
PREREQUISITE - mode-bearing diff (QRM-3.1): the Gate consumes a mode-carrying diff (local git diff --raw, or an equivalent GitHubForge.compare) so symlink/gitlink floors hold in the enforcement path
PREREQUISITE - GitHubForge parity: GitHubForge.compare returns mode-bearing, rename-faithful DiffEntry[] (currently fails closed by throwing) before any forge-mode tier/coverage decision

the Gate is not claimed as complete tier-floor enforcement until every acceptance item prefixed 'PREREQUISITE' in this manifest is met, regardless of their order in the list (principle 2: do not claim enforcement not shipped)

PREREQUISITE - delegated/transitive agent-config references: a floored config that references arbitrary files (opencode.json instructions:/{file:}, CLAUDE.md @import, Cursor rule refs) must not let a PR edit the referenced file at a tier below the config's floor; closed by QRM-3.4 (dynamic floor of parsed reference targets). A floor delegation can bypass = a leaky Gate.
